heading: Saturday Night
text: Clearing, with additional clouds north before dawn. Chilly with a chance for patchy frost. Lows in the upper 30s to mid 40s. North wind diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Sunday
text: Clouds spreading south, becoming mostly cloudy by midday, with rain showers heading south after noon. Not as cool. Highs from the upper 60s to low 70s, with a few mid 60s in the northeast. Northwest wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly cloudy with scattered to numerous rain showers. Showers begin to diminish west to east before dawn. Lows in the low to mid 40s.
